title: DF-001: Fix URL parenthesis encoding in backend utility links
brief: Fix the backend-legal find_regular_links utility so detected HTTP/HTTPS URLs encode both opening and closing parentheses, including when the URL ends with a closing parenthesis. This ticket is intentionally small for the first supervised Dark Factory run.

criteria.statement: find_regular_links encodes both opening and closing parentheses inside detected HTTP/HTTPS URLs.
criteria.verification: Focused unit tests in tests/unit/test_services_utils.py assert encoded %28 and %29 output for URLs with parentheses.

criteria.statement: URLs ending with a closing parenthesis do not leave the final parenthesis unencoded.
criteria.verification: A regression test covers a URL that ends in ')'.

criteria.statement: Existing non-parenthesis link behavior remains unchanged.
criteria.verification: Existing tests for plain HTTP/HTTPS links and paths still pass.

loops.escalation: If the challenge finds missed work, errors, or conflicts, return to the planning team for correction before implementation proceeds.

taskRoute.decision: This WorkOrder is explicitly routed to the legal/dev app under aila-code, not main app stage.
